track_a.name: ProPacks Only
track_a.subject: Post-op incision care for {practice_name}
track_a.body:
Dr. {last_name},

{volume_hook}, I wanted to reach out about a solution that's helping orthopedic practices like {practice_name} improve post-op incision outcomes while saving time and increasing per-case profitability.

ProPacks are standardized post-operative incision care kits designed specifically for {procedure_focus} patients. Surgeons using ProPacks report:

- Better, more predictable patient outcomes with standardized wound care protocols
- Reduced physician time spent on post-op wound management
- Full compliance and audit protection with documented care pathways
- Increased per-case profitability through bundled incision care

I'd love to set up a quick lunch & learn at {practice_name} in {city} to walk through how ProPacks could fit into your current post-op protocol — or if easier, a brief intro call works too.

Would any day next week work for a 15-minute conversation?

Best regards,
{sender_name}
{sender_title}
{sender_email}

track_b.name: ProPacks + Microlyte SAM
track_b.subject: Post-op incision innovation for {practice_name}
track_b.body:
Dr. {last_name},

{volume_hook}, I wanted to introduce two innovations that are transforming post-op care for orthopedic practices like {practice_name}.

First, ProPacks — standardized post-operative incision care kits for {procedure_focus} patients that deliver:

- Better, more predictable patient outcomes
- Reduced physician time on post-op wound management
- Full compliance and audit protection
- Increased per-case profitability

Second, Microlyte SAM — an advanced antimicrobial wound matrix that's a game-changer for complex wound management:

- 99.99% microbial reduction sustained for 72+ hours (ionic and metallic silver)
- Fully synthetic and bioresorbable — no painful removal required
- Simple "peel and place" application that integrates seamlessly into existing workflows
- HCPCS A2005 — reimbursable on Day 1 in your MAC jurisdiction with no 30-day conservative care failure requirement

I'd love to set up a lunch & learn at {practice_name} in {city} to demonstrate both products — or if easier, a quick intro call to start.

Would any day next week work for 15 minutes?

Best regards,
{sender_name}
{sender_title}
{sender_email}
